block_00: Changes to chat feature on the platform
block_02: We would like to inform you of a small change which will commence in the following week. The direct “chat” feature with your Account Manager will no longer be available. However, chat with our support specialists will be enabled and someone will be able to assist you 24/7.
block_03: The reason we have taken this decision is for the sole purpose of providing a constant and better service for you which will be available every hour of the day and seven days a week.
block_04: Moreover, you will still be able to have direct contact with your current Account Manager. Please feel free to request a callback or send an email for any assistance you require.
block_05:
We are constantly striving to improve our service!
Feel free to contact us for more details.
